items.title: v0.42.59.0 fix(autopilot): verify lock holder process before exiting
items.explanation: If autopilot crashes, its lock file can stay behind and block new runs until it gets old enough. The fix checks whether the process that held the lock is still alive before giving up.
items.proposedSolution: Verify the lock holder process is alive before exiting, then merge through the normal release process.
